translation: self.assertTrue(self.getStringEncoder().isEncodeEquals(" P rz e m y s l", " P sh e m e sh i l"))
self.assertTrue(self.getStringEncoder().isEncodeEquals("R o s o ch o w a c ie c", " R o s o k ho v a ts e ts"))
self.assertEqual("ae io  u", self.getStringEncoder().removeAccents("áé íó  ú"))
